title.en: Invocation upon hearing a dog barking in the night

items.arabicText: ((إِذَا سَمِعْتُمْ نُبَاحَ الْكِلاَبِ وَنَهِيقَ الْحَمِيرِ بِاللَّيْلِ فَتَعَوَّذُوا بِاللَّهِ مِنْهُنَّ؛ فَإِنَّهُنَّ يَرَيْنَ مَا لاَ تَرَوْنَ)).

translations.en: (If you hear the barking of dogs or the braying of asses at night, seek refuge in Allah for they see what you do not.)
